caption: A person with light skin and short dark hair is visible in the upper right corner of a screen-sharing session. The screen displays a web browser with multiple open tabs and a central document titled "Introduction" under the heading "Rural Community Food System." The text asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" and lists "Session Videos" with several bulleted links. To the right of this text is a "List of Logos" and a sidebar containing various links such as "Now Pronoun System Balance," "Tidomotion," and "Que Vais?". A complex green mind map with nodes and connecting lines is visible in the center of the page. As the sequence progresses, the person in the video feed remains in a similar position, and the browser content remains static, showing the same instructional page and navigational layout.
